raw_consumer_statement:
I purchased two chargers from Best Buy totaling {$210.00}. Neither order was ever received.

First delivery : The package was stolen from my doorstep. I live in an area with high package theft, which is why my apartment complex has XXXX lockboxes for secure delivery. The driver did not use the lockbox. Best Buy reshipped the order. 

Second delivery : Best Buy 's delivery XXXX ( XXXX ) again failed to use the XXXX lockbox. Worse, the driver disclosed my full name, apartment number, address, and the fact that I was not home to an unauthorized stranger at my building. This directly resulted in my package being stolen. I have video of the driver with the stranger at my lockbox and video of me opening an empty box. I filed a police report ( # XXXX, XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX 's Department ). I also have a witness who heard the driver disclose my information. 

Delivery companies have access to XXXX lockboxes and know which residents are registered. There is no excuse for leaving packages on doorsteps or disclosing personal information to strangers. 

I disputed the charges with Citi twice. Both times they sided with Best Buy. 
First denial reason : " The services or merchandise was provided as intended. '' This is false, I never received the products, and they were not secured properly in the provided lockboxes. 

Second denial reason : " The charge represents postage associated with the return of the merchandise ; per the merchant 's policy the customer is responsible for postage. '' This makes no sense, I never received any merchandise to return. There was no return. This reason is completely inapplicable. 

I provided Citi with a police report, email from complex, proof of other proper delivers, and the photo of the XXXX  code with a random stranger. I had no way to provide the video. They have not properly reviewed my evidence and continue to deny my dispute with invalid reasons. 

I have also attempted to resolve this directly with Best Buy. I contacted their customer service and spoke with an executive representative named XXXX. I sent him all my evidence, videos, photos, police report, and witness information. He stopped responding. I have been completely stonewalled. 

I am requesting Citi reopen my dispute and issue a full refund of {$210.00}. I paid for products I never received because the merchant 's delivery XXXX failed to secure my packages and violated my privacy.
